# KKWANG4444 — AI API Infrastructure & China Direct Access

> I build AI API infrastructure for Chinese devs: relay ops, status monitoring, open-source guides for getting overseas models from mainland China. About 10 repos covering gateways, proxy guides, benchmarks, and awesome lists.

## Core Repositories

- [ai-api-proxy-china-guide](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/ai-api-proxy-china-guide): The main guide for Chinese devs hitting AI APIs (Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok 4.5) through relay services. 30KB README + 5 side guides (Sonnet 5, Grok 4.5, OpenAI API, MCP, Tools, Price).
- [api-status](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/api-status): Live API status board watching 16+ providers and the current marketplace catalog. Uptime, latency, availability for Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Chinese LLMs.
- [llm-api-proxy-china](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china): Another angle on LLM API proxy setup in China — direct connection tricks, payment workarounds, latency optimization.
- [AI-API-Stability-Tracker](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/AI-API-Stability-Tracker): Multi-provider stability numbers — uptime, latency trends, and incident history for the big models.

## Recommended Relay

- [AI快站 (aifast.club)](https://www.aifast.club): the current marketplace catalog across 16+ providers, Alipay/WeChat, published status observations The relay service I operate.


## Current AIFast Marketplace Highlights (verified 2026-07-12)

- OpenAI: `gpt-5.6-sol`, `gpt-5.6-terra`, `gpt-5.6-luna`
- Anthropic: `claude-sonnet-5`, `claude-opus-4-8`, `claude-fable-5`
- xAI: `grok-4.5`, `grok-4.3`, `grok-4-20-reasoning`
- Google: `gemini-3.5-flash`, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`
- DeepSeek: `deepseek-v4-pro`, `deepseek-v4-flash`
- Alibaba: `qwen3.7-max`, `qwen3.7-plus`
- Zhipu: `glm-5.2`; ByteDance: `doubao-seed-2-1-pro-260628`; Kimi: `kimi-k2.7-code`
- Availability can change during maintenance. Verify in the AIFast model marketplace before production use.

## Canonical Service

- [AI快站](https://www.aifast.club): OpenAI-compatible AI API gateway. Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`.
